overall_score.label: Below Godot-docs parity
overall_score.weights_basis: coverage=20%, accuracy=15%, navigation=10%, task_success=15%, api_completeness=15%, examples=8%, troubleshooting=7%, maintainability=5%, versioning=3%, media=2%

key_evidence: 22 of 29 registered classes have zero documentation
docs/getting-started/installation.md:30-33 cites register_types.cpp lines 82-85-100 but actual lines are 77-81-88
docs/reference/project-settings.md:21 claims 76 registered keys; actual count may differ
docs/index.md uses backtick code paths (not markdown links) for all 30+ entries
docs/index.md:64-67 references 4 release/ files that do not exist
docs/getting-started/quick-start.md: 4-step flow with verification gates, multi-platform commands
docs/workflows/importing.md: complete import workflow with troubleshooting
docs/workflows/GSPLATWORLD_BAKE.md: bake workflow with all options documented
3 doc_classes XML files, all stub-only (brief description + empty tutorials, no methods/members/signals)
docs/features/ply-loader.md:57-90: complete GDScript examples with error handling
Generated shader/GDScript references contain no examples
Feature pages include targeted troubleshooting tables (ply-loader, color-grading, artist_pipeline, importing, GSPLATWORLD_BAKE)
Docs pipeline: build_docs_site.py, stage_public_docs.py, check_docs_media_budget.py, check_links.py
Contribution standards require link checks: docs/governance/contribution-standards.md
Versioned docs model documented: docs/development/docs-site.md (mike + MkDocs Material)
CHANGELOG.md line 4: 'This changelog is not maintained.'
4 release doc references in index.md point to non-existent files
docs/features/media.md: media conventions documented with LFS guidance
0 screenshots of editor UI, inspector, or visual results

parity_criteria: 100% of user-visible registered classes have maintained API docs (markdown and/or filled XML) with methods/members/signals documented
0 stale file:line code references in onboarding/reference docs, enforced by automated validation
Install → first render → import → tune → troubleshoot user journey completable from docs alone
docs/index.md uses valid markdown links for all entries; 0 broken references; 0 public orphan pages
CI enforces link checks, media budget, strict docs build, and generated-doc freshness checks on every PR
Top 15 recurring issues have structured symptom→cause→fix troubleshooting entries with runnable commands
Compatibility matrix has validated evidence for ≥3 platforms at every tagged release
Versioned release notes published with each mike deploy version
0 instances of Godot-banned words (obvious, simple, basic, easy, actual, just, clear, however) in user-facing docs
All doc_classes XML files include brief_description + description + methods + members + signals for their respective classes
